import React,{useState,useEffect,createContext}from'react';import Login from'./pages/Login';import Dashboard from'./pages/Dashboard';import Beneficiaries from'./pages/Beneficiaries';import AidRequests from'./pages/AidRequests';import Deliveries from'./pages/Deliveries';import BeneficiaryPortal from'./pages/BeneficiaryPortal';import Reports from'./pages/Reports';import Landing from'./pages/Landing';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";export const ThemeContext=/*#__PURE__*/createContext();function App(){const[currentPage,setCurrentPage]=useState('landing');const[isDarkMode,setIsDarkMode]=useState(false);const isLoggedIn=localStorage.getItem('token');const user=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('user')||'{}');// Initialize Dark Mode from localStorage or system preference
useEffect(()=>{const savedTheme=localStorage.getItem('theme');const prefersDark=window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches;if(savedTheme==='dark'||!savedTheme&&prefersDark){setIsDarkMode(true);document.documentElement.classList.add('dark');}},[]);const toggleTheme=()=>{setIsDarkMode(!isDarkMode);if(!isDarkMode){document.documentElement.classList.add('dark');localStorage.setItem('theme','dark');}else{document.documentElement.classList.remove('dark');localStorage.setItem('theme','light');}};window.navigateTo=page=>setCurrentPage(page);const renderPage=()=>{if(!isLoggedIn){if(currentPage==='login')return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Login,{});return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Landing,{});}if(currentPage==='landing')return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Landing,{});if(user.role==='beneficiary')return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(BeneficiaryPortal,{});if(currentPage==='beneficiaries')return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Beneficiaries,{});if(currentPage==='requests')return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AidRequests,{});if(currentPage==='deliveries')return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Deliveries,{});if(currentPage==='reports')return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Reports,{});return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Dashboard,{});};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ThemeContext.Provider,{value:{isDarkMode,toggleTheme},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"min-h-screen bg-white transition-colors duration-300 dark:bg-slate-900",children:renderPage()})});}export default App;
